## Lecture slides "Linear Mixed Model - LMM"

[Open/download the PDF](course_content/18022026_Combined.pdf)

<details>
<summary>Show PDF inline</summary>

<object data="18022026_Combined.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="900">
  <p><a href="18022026_Combined.pdf">Open/download the PDF</a></p>
</object>

</details>
